lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What did the Israelites ask for?
answers: A king like the other nations had
A queen
A miracle
A new prophet

questions.text: Who was supposed to be Israel’s king?
answers: God
Samuel
Moses
David

questions.text: After Samuel prayed, what did God say?
answers: They have rejected Me; let them have a king
Let me think about it
I'll never let you have a king
Samuel, you will be their king

questions.text: What did Samuel warn a king would do?
answers: Take their riches, men his soldiers and women his servants
Star wars all the time
Make things a lot better
Lead them back to Egypt

questions.text: How did Saul end up at Samuel’s house?
answers: He was looking for his father’s lost donkeys
He was invited to a feast
He came to rob Samuel's house
He was looking for his mom's lost monkeys

questions.text: How did Samuel know Saul was chosen by God?
answers: God told him when he saw Saul
A light shown from heaven
The people all voted for Saul
He had a special dream from God

questions.text: What does it mean that Samuel anointed Saul?
answers: He poured oil over his head to show he was chosen as king
He gave him a crown to wear
He gave him a special sword
He bowed down before him three times

questions.text: What did God do to show Saul that God was with him?
answers: Samuel described four things, and they all happened
He sent fire from heaven
He gave Saul super strength
He sent an angel with a message

questions.text: Who came to Saul and gave him power?
answers: God’s Spirit
An angel
A demon
One of the lost donkeys

questions.text: Why couldn’t the people find Saul when he was chosen king?
answers: He was hiding among the supplies
He ran away
He was lost
He was still looking for his lost donkeys
